task: Delete all my notes in Markor.

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the Android home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and a few others in the dock. The target app "Markor" is not visible on this main home screen page.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open the Markor app → | Step 2: Select all notes | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the Markor app is not on the current home screen page. To proceed with deleting notes in Markor, I need to launch the app first. Since it's not visible, I will use a system-level open action to launch "Markor" directly.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The current screen displays the "Files" tab in the Markor app. There is a list of several markdown files, including "2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md", "2023_09_09_grocery_list_weekly.md", "9r5p_summer_vacation_plans.md", "art_project_sketches_copy.md", "budget_home_renovation_final.md", and "fW01A_backup.md". All files are visible in the list.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes → | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
The current step in the plan requires selecting all notes to prepare for deletion. In Android file lists, selecting multiple items usually requires a long press on one item to enter selection mode first. I will perform a long press on the first note in the list ("2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md") to activate the multi-selection interface.

[Memory]
App opened successfully. Target is to delete all notes in the list (6 files currently visible). Need to enter multi-selection mode first.

[Observation]
The screen is in selection mode with the first note ("2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md") selected, indicated by a red checkmark. The top action bar now displays options like star, AI, info, delete (trash can icon), and more options. The remaining five notes are unselected.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes → | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
The current plan step is to select all notes. Since only the first one is selected, I need to continue selecting the rest. I will tap on the next note in the list ("2023_09_09_grocery_list_weekly.md") to add it to the selection. I will repeat this process for all visible notes until they are all selected.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection mode active. 1/6 notes selected (first one). Remaining: 5.

[Observation]
The screen displays the file list in selection mode. The first two notes ("2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md" and "2023_09_09_grocery_list_weekly.md") are now selected, marked with red checkmarks. The third note ("9r5p_summer_vacation_plans.md") and the subsequent three notes remain unselected.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes → | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
The current plan step is to select all notes. With 2 out of 6 notes selected, I need to continue selecting the remaining ones. I will tap on the third note ("9r5p_summer_vacation_plans.md") to add it to the selection list.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection mode active. 2/6 notes selected. Remaining: 4.

[Observation]
The screen shows the file list in selection mode. The first three notes ("2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md", "2023_09_09_grocery_list_weekly.md", and "9r5p_summer_vacation_plans.md") are selected, indicated by red checkmarks. The fourth ("art_project_sketches_copy.md") and fifth ("budget_home_renovation_final.md") notes are currently unselected.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes → | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
The current plan step is to select all notes. According to the observation, 3 out of 6 notes are selected. I need to continue adding the unselected notes to the selection. I will tap on the fourth note ("art_project_sketches_copy.md") to select it.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection mode active. 3/6 notes selected. Remaining: 3.

[Observation]
The screen is in selection mode within the Markor app. The first four notes ("2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md", "2023_09_09_grocery_list_weekly.md", "9r5p_summer_vacation_plans.md", and "art_project_sketches_copy.md") are selected, as shown by the red checkmarks. The fifth note ("budget_home_renovation_final.md") and the sixth note ("fW01A_backup.md") are still unselected.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes → | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
The current plan step is to select all notes. Based on the observation, 4 out of 6 notes are currently selected. I need to continue selecting the remaining ones. I will tap on the fifth note ("budget_home_renovation_final.md") to add it to the selection.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection mode active. 4/6 notes selected. Remaining: 2.

[Observation]
The screen shows the Markor app's file list in selection mode. Five notes are currently selected, indicated by red checkmarks (from "2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md" down to "budget_home_renovation_final.md"). The sixth and final note, "fW01A_backup.md", remains unselected with a gray document icon.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes → | Step 3: Delete the selected notes

[Decision]
The current plan step is to select all notes. Based on the observation, 5 out of 6 notes are selected. To complete the selection phase, I need to select the last remaining unselected note. I will tap on "fW01A_backup.md" to add it to the selection.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection mode active. 5/6 notes selected. Remaining: 1.

[Observation]
The screen displays the Markor file list where all six notes are now selected, as indicated by the red checkmarks next to each file name ("2023_02_03_meeting_notes_project_team.md" through "fW01A_backup.md"). The top action bar has changed to selection mode, showing a trash can (delete) icon on the right side.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes ✓ | Step 3: Delete the selected notes →

[Decision]
The current plan step is to delete the selected notes. Since all notes have been successfully selected (6/6), the next logical action is to initiate the deletion. The trash can icon in the top right corner is the standard button for deleting items in this mode. I will tap this icon to proceed.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection mode active. All 6 notes selected. Ready for deletion confirmation.

[Observation]
The screen shows a "Confirm Delete" dialog box overlaid on the file list. The dialog asks "Do you really want to delete this Documents?" and lists the paths of all six selected notes. There are "CANCEL" and "OK" buttons at the bottom of the dialog.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes ✓ | Step 3: Delete the selected notes ✓ | Step 4: Confirm deletion →

[Decision]
The current plan step is to confirm the deletion. The confirmation dialog is visible, presenting the list of files to be deleted. To finalize the deletion of all notes as requested by the user instruction, I need to confirm this action. I will tap the "OK" button to proceed.

[Memory]
Target: delete all 6 notes. Selection completed. Deletion confirmation dialog active. Pending final confirmation to complete the task.

[Observation]
The screen displays the "Documents" directory in the Markor app. The main area is completely empty except for a text emoticon `¯\_(ツ)_/¯`, which indicates there are no files present in this folder. The file list is gone, confirming the previous deletion was successful.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open the Markor app ✓ | Step 2: Select all notes ✓ | Step 3: Delete the selected notes ✓ | Step 4: Confirm deletion ✓ | Step 5: Verify completion →

[Decision]
The current plan step is to verify completion. Based on the observation, the directory is now empty, showing the "no files" emoticon. This confirms that all notes have been successfully deleted as per the user's instruction "Delete all my notes in Markor." Since the goal has been achieved and no further actions are required, I will declare the task complete.

[Memory]
Target: delete all notes. All 6 notes selected and deletion confirmed. Directory is now empty. Task objective fulfilled.
